title: バクシン！　学級委員長！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun's shining, and the sky is clear. Bolstered by the pleasant
weather, I happily make my way to the trainers' office, when I hear a
sudden cry.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You there! Move it, move it, MOOOVE IT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stomp, stomp, stomp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Skid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hardly have time to react before the Umamusume approaching me at
breakneck speed—Sakura Bakushin O—comes to a grinding halt
seconds before collision.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Emergency brakes are working like a CHARM! As expected, my
swiftness extends to my decision-making and reaction time too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My deepest and sincerest apologies! I was in a hurry!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, please be aware that you're on Tracen Academy grounds!
Here, we RUN in the halls, and the last one through the school gate is
a rotten egg!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I'm afraid our discussion on the expectations and realities of
Tracen Academy conduct will have to wait! For you see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My beloved classmates are awaiting the arrival of their devoted class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not, my constituents, your FEARLESS leader is on her way!
Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My eyes widen as Sakura Bakushin O takes off with the same speed
and force that carried her to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lecture was a bit all over the place, but in this case, her actions
literally speak louder than words. I'm in awe at her speed...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You there! Stop!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you can fool the eyes of the class representative! I see all!
Especially if you're trying to skip out on cleaning duty!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Representatiiive sprint! Draaagh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hear ye! Hear ye! Your class representative has exciting news!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today's cafeteria dessert is sakura mochi! That's right, the same
delectable rice cakes that delight the taste buds of all, especially me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, follow me to glorious dessert! Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like no matter where I go, I run into Sakura Bakushin O.
Reflecting on the strange string of coincidences, I sit down at my
desk, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock! Slide...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Pardon the intrusion and greetings! Class Representative Sakura
Bakushin O, at your service!
choice_data_list: Uh... I already know your name...
Uh... I already know your name...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You do?! H-how? Wait, could it be...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Did you by chance hear of my spotless conduct as class
representative?! Well, I don't blame you for being impressed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, you're too kind! Soon I will surpass normal class representation
and be elevated to the Class Representative Hall of Fame! Now, tell
me all that you've heard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps to Sakura Bakushin O's disappointment, I quickly remind her
that we met this morning.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it, you do look familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That I do! And with that misunderstanding out of the way, there's nothing to get in the way of our newfound friendship! A win for all involved!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well then, with that new bond forged, I will be on my way! Until we
meet again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I DIDN'T COME HERE TO MAKE FRIENDS!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The teacher is counting on me, the trustworthy class representative,
to deliver these documents to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me the documents, which I skim over. They look to be
about the tryouts happening this weekend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As my eyes wander down the page, I spot the name "Sakura Bakushin
O" listed as one of the racers...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all! You can always count on the class representative
to get the job done!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now to report back to the teacher... After that, I need to replace the
water in the flower vases, change the school newspaper, and prepare
the training course.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! If I want to be a good class representative and role model,
I need to give my all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And giving my all is something I've always been very good at, even as a kid!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Those math problems about apples and oranges? Easy-peasy for a
PRODIGY! A game of tag? There's never been a faster player!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
From the moment I let out my first cries as a baby, my parents knew
that I was destined for greatness. We just didn't know how...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That is, until that fateful day in first grade when I realized my true
calling!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Care to take a guess? I'll give you a hint: It starts with c and rhymes with "glass photosensitive."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding! Cooorrect!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget how I was observing the butterflies outside when the
teacher asked for candidates. It was so quiet, I could hear the clock
ticking.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's when the teacher looked at me, the one seated at the front of
the class, and said the words that changed my life...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The class representative serves as a model for all other students to
look up to. Only the hardest-working students can do it. Would you
like to try?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And in that moment... I knew!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I exist to be class representative, and the role of class representative
exists for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I was born to be the class representative! Why else would I be gifted with so much talent and brains?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah, would you look at the time! Apologies, but I must be off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Sakura Bakushin O takes off with the same boundless
energy I saw this morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her reasons for being class representative feel a touch exaggerated,
but I am curious to see how her tryout race goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just a little though...
